page: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EADSv5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 96 vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 32 KB L1d cache, 0.5 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache, with hardware support for AVX, AES, VAES, SHA_ni, and SVM virtualization.

The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing 7.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3686 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. This high resource density makes the server highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory and local storage capacity without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware, which is absent on this model.

In benchmark evaluations, the E96ads_v5 demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance and encryption capabilities, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU encryption tests. PassMark memory performance also ranks in the top 10%. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark database operations perform in the top 25%, while large-block memory bandwidth and single-threaded compression tasks register in the middle 50%.

Given these hardware specifications and benchmark results, the E96ads_v5 is optimized for memory-intensive and database-heavy workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data warehousing, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor operating at 3.525 GHz. It delivers 96 vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and 672.0 GB of RAM, alongside 3686 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it achieves top-tier multi-core CPU and encryption performance, ranking in the top 10% of benchmarked systems. PassMark memory scores also place in the top 10%, while database operations and Redis SET performance rank in the top 25%. The server's high memory-to-vCPU ratio and strong multi-threaded capabilities make it highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive applications. It is optimized for large-scale databases, Redis caching, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3686 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and encryption performance for database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 96 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3686 GB local storage, built for database and memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine with ninety-six virtual cores, massive local storage, and top-tier multi-core processing for demanding database workloads.

672.0 GB of system memory and 3686 GB of local storage
